items.title: add a one-sentence description of the autonomous loop to this file
items.description: Tightly scoped, single-line documentation change with a crystal-clear acceptance criterion. Zero regression risk, no dependencies, and unblocks readers trying to understand the autonomous loop spec at a glance. Completing this first establishes a canonical one-liner that other items (such as the broader loop documentation chore) can reference.

items.title: The autonomous loop (CycleRunner) scans for TODO markers, failed sessions, and cost anomalies to build a backlog…
items.description: This TODO marker contains a dense prose description of the autonomous loop's full behavior rather than a discrete actionable instruction, which lowers confidence in scoping. The work is most likely a documentation or inline-comment chore that validates the plan doc against the current implementation. Ranked second because its scope is fuzzier and it carries light regression risk if the doc is used as a normative reference by the CycleRunner itself. Completing item 1 first provides the canonical summary sentence this doc may need to cite.
